_publications._publicationTitle: Impact of MEK Inhibitor Therapy on Neurocognitive Functioning in NF1.

_contextSnippet: Using an RCI framework, however, our statistical approaches allowed for an in-depth and clinically meaningful assessment of individual outcomes... The use of RCI partially accounts for this, as it uses data from normative test-retest samples as comparison
details: RCI analyses provided clinically meaningful assessment of individual outcomes. Used normative test-retest samples as comparison to account for lack of control group. RCI classifications showed significant differences from expected normative distributions (5/90/5%) for multiple measures including BRIEF MCI at 48 weeks and Cogstate ONB at both timepoints
